response:
```json
{
  "action": "sql",
  "sql": "SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ss_ext_sales_price), 0) + COALESCE(SUM(ws_ext_sales_price), 0) + COALESCE(SUM(cs_ext_sales_price), 0) AS total_sales_revenue FROM (SELECT ss_ext_sales_price FROM store_sales UNION ALL SELECT ws_ext_sales_price FROM web_sales UNION ALL SELECT cs_ext_sales_price FROM catalog_sales) t(ext_sales_price)",
  "reason": null
}
```

The issue was that UNION ALL requires column name alignment. The subquery columns need a consistent alias. Fixed by aliasing the subquery with `t(ext_sales_price)`.
